narrative:
Precinct Ridge (precinct in Van Wert County) has 951 registered voters, with 49.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 42.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 7.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 34.4 percentage points.
